# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <namespace>
spec:
  selector: {}
  rules:
    - from:
        # Allow all traffic to any service in the mesh
        - namespaceSelector: {}
          podSelector: {}
        # Allow all traffic between services within the same namespace
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: <namespace>
          podSelector: {}
